Klasse TSPGAConfig

java.lang.Object
de.fhdwhannover.integrea.config.TSPGAConfig
public class TSPGAConfig extends Object
Configuration class for setting up a genetic algorithm (GA) to solve the Traveling Salesman Problem (TSP). This class bundles all GA parameters, evolutionary operators, problem-specific settings, and data services.

The configuration can be initialized with default values or overridden using an external AppConfig. GA components such as selection, crossover, mutation, and fitness function are initialized with reasonable defaults but may be replaced if needed.

  • Feldübersicht

    Felder
    Modifikator und Typ
    Feld
    Beschreibung
    List<String>
    cityNames
     
    Crossover<Integer>
    crossover
    Crossover operator used to recombine parent tours.
    double
    crossoverRate
    Probability that crossover is applied during reproduction.
    double[][]
    distanceMatrix
     
    FitnessFunction<Integer>
    fitnessFunction
    Fitness function evaluating TSP tours.
    int
    maxGenerations
    Maximum number of generations the GA will run.
    Mutation<Integer>
    mutation
    Mutation operator used to introduce variation in tours.
    double
    mutationRate
    Probability that mutation is applied to offspring.
    int
    populationSize
    Number of individuals in each generation.
    Selection<Integer>
    selection
    Selection operator used to choose parents.

  • Konstruktorübersicht

    Konstruktoren
    Konstruktor
    Beschreibung
    TSPGAConfig(AppConfig appConfig, ConsoleOutput consoleOutput)
    Creates a TSP GA configuration and optionally overrides default parameters using values from AppConfig.
    TSPGAConfig(ConsoleOutput consoleOutput)
     

  • Methodenübersicht

    Modifikator und Typ
    Methode
    Beschreibung
    GeneticAlgorithm<Integer>
    createGeneticAlgorithm()
    Creates a fully configured GeneticAlgorithm instance using the parameters and operators defined in this configuration.

    Von Klasse geerbte Methoden Object

    clone, equals, finalize, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, toString, wait, wait, wait

  • Felddetails

    • populationSize

      public int populationSize
      Number of individuals in each generation.

    • crossoverRate

      public double crossoverRate
      Probability that crossover is applied during reproduction.

    • mutationRate

      public double mutationRate
      Probability that mutation is applied to offspring.

    • maxGenerations

      public int maxGenerations
      Maximum number of generations the GA will run.

    • selection

      public Selection<Integer> selection
      Selection operator used to choose parents.

    • crossover

      public Crossover<Integer> crossover
      Crossover operator used to recombine parent tours.

    • mutation

      public Mutation<Integer> mutation
      Mutation operator used to introduce variation in tours.

    • fitnessFunction

      public FitnessFunction<Integer> fitnessFunction
      Fitness function evaluating TSP tours.

    • cityNames

      public List<String> cityNames

    • distanceMatrix

      public double[][] distanceMatrix

  • Konstruktordetails

    • TSPGAConfig

      public TSPGAConfig(ConsoleOutput consoleOutput)

    • TSPGAConfig

      public TSPGAConfig(AppConfig appConfig, ConsoleOutput consoleOutput)
      Creates a TSP GA configuration and optionally overrides default parameters using values from AppConfig.
      Parameter:
      appConfig - optional external configuration; may be null
      consoleOutput - console output handler for GA messages

  • Methodendetails

    • createGeneticAlgorithm

      public GeneticAlgorithm<Integer> createGeneticAlgorithm()
      Creates a fully configured GeneticAlgorithm instance using the parameters and operators defined in this configuration.
      Gibt zurück:
      a ready-to-run genetic algorithm instance for the TSP
      Löst aus:
      IllegalStateException - if required GA components are missing
